creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/freebsd-questions/#_how_to_submit_a_question> mentions: 

Eudora®

<https://computerhistory.org/blog/the-eudora-email-client-source-code/>

Since source code was acquired by the Computer History Museum in 2018, let's assume that use of museum pieces is so rare that it need not be mentioned in FreeBSD documentation such as this. 

% grep -R "Eudora(R)" /usr/doc/documentation
/usr/doc/documentation/content/es/articles/freebsd-questions/_index.adoc:** Eudora(R)
/usr/doc/documentation/content/es/articles/freebsd-questions/_index.po:msgid "Eudora(R)"
/usr/doc/documentation/content/es/articles/freebsd-questions/_index.po:msgstr "Eudora(R)"
/usr/doc/documentation/content/zh-tw/articles/mailing-list-faq/_index.adoc:** (舊版的)Eudora(R)
/usr/doc/documentation/content/zh-tw/articles/freebsd-questions/_index.adoc:** Eudora(R)
/usr/doc/documentation/content/en/articles/freebsd-questions/_index.adoc:** Eudora(R)
/usr/doc/documentation/content/el/articles/mailing-list-faq/_index.adoc:** Eudora(R) (παλιότερες εκδόσεις)
/usr/doc/documentation/content/el/articles/freebsd-questions/_index.adoc:** Eudora(R)
/usr/doc/documentation/content/ru/articles/freebsd-questions/_index.adoc:** Eudora(R)
/usr/doc/documentation/content/pt-br/articles/freebsd-questions/_index.adoc:** Eudora(R)
%
